scripts.build: vite build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');fs.copyFileSync('manifest.json','dist/manifest.json');fs.mkdirSync('dist/icons',{recursive:true});for(const name of fs.readdirSync('public/icons')){fs.copyFileSync(path.join('public/icons',name),path.join('dist/icons',name));}"
scripts.build:quick: vite build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');fs.copyFileSync('manifest.json','dist/manifest.json');fs.mkdirSync('dist/icons',{recursive:true});for(const name of fs.readdirSync('public/icons')){fs.copyFileSync(path.join('public/icons',name),path.join('dist/icons',name));}"
